focus: Tanzania mainland tax-benefit surface: individual income tax (PAYE and accounts bases), presumptive income tax, PSSSF/NSSF pension contributions, NHIF health contributions, VAT, excise duties, and the TASAF Productive Social Safety Net transfers; plus the Zanzibar (tz-znz) surface: Zanzibar VAT, Zanzibar excise (tobacco and kerosene rows), ZSSF contributions, and the ZUPS universal pension.
purpose: Household-level comparison-oracle and supporting-source references for Tanzania Axiom coverage. None of these are legal authority.
oracle_scope: A RuleSpec oracle must be an executable, pinned external calculator that accepts household-level inputs and returns household-level tax-benefit outputs comparable to Axiom outputs. Aggregate simulators, distributional reports, parameter documentation, and public model summaries are supporting references only, not oracles.

oracles.name: TAZMOD
oracles.dataset: tz_2012_a5, tz_2018_a9 (HBS-based input microdata shipped in the bundle)
oracles.role: Household-level tax-benefit comparison oracle for mainland Tanzania. TAZMOD is the SOUTHMOD tax-benefit microsimulation model for Tanzania (UNU-WIDER). Built on the EUROMOD platform; systems TZ_2012-TZ_2023 (Zanzibar has its own model, ZANMOD scope ZN, out of this repository's scope).

availability_check.detail: The licensed SOUTHMOD A4.0 bundle held under the Adhesion Agreement for the Ghana lane also carries TAZMOD with systems TZ_2012-TZ_2023 and two bundled HBS-based input datasets, so per-case and dataset-backed probes need no further data application (personal links; non-redistributable; the bundle and datasets must never be committed or shared). The EUROMOD-engine runtime is proven from the Ghana lane (x86_64 py3.12 venv + euromod 0.2.18 + x64 .NET 10), and the runner-executed comparison harness is proven from the Rwanda lane (scripts/run_comparison.py with euromod_annualize_outputs for Month-period modules). The latest system is TZ_2023 - the rules in force on 30 June 2023 (Finance Act 2022 state) - which is the validation year for this repository. The TZ_2023 policy-surface inventory (27 policies, 9 active instruments) is recorded at ~/.axiom/oracles/southmod/harness-tz/tazmod/inventory_result.json.

oracles.name: ZANMOD
oracles.dataset: Zanzibar HBS 2019/20-based input microdata (shipped with the licensed bundle where included)
oracles.role: Household-level tax-benefit comparison oracle for Zanzibar. ZANMOD is the SOUTHMOD tax-benefit microsimulation model for Zanzibar (UNU-WIDER; launched November 2023). Policy years 2019-24. Mainland Tanzania has its own model, TAZMOD, out of this repository's scope.

availability_check.detail: The locally held licensed SOUTHMOD bundle (see rulespec-tz oracle-index: SOUTHMOD_A4.0, EUROMOD runtime proven on the Ghana and Rwanda lanes) must be inventoried for ZANMOD ZN systems before wiring; ZANMOD launched November 2023, so the bundled vintage may or may not carry it. If absent, request the ZANMOD model through the SOUTHMOD access process under the existing Adhesion Agreement. Validation frame: ZANMOD v1.1, policy years 2019-24 (report CR-ZANMOD-v1.1).
